requiredCorrections.note: Add a proper agency/trust/verification footer with agency name, RA number, MEA badge, and any required compliance marks.
Increase the prominence and integration of the contact information (WhatsApp/phone/email) and ensure it stands out more clearly from background elements.
Organize the jobs/roles list into clearer, distinct cards or groupings to reduce visual overwhelm and improve legibility over the model's suit.
Improve text contrast particularly in areas crossing over busy or dark/bright image transitions.
Rework headline to focus on a candidate hook: something destination + project/sector (e.g., 'SAUDI ARABIA HOSPITALITY MEGA OPENING') as the anchor headline.
Integrate the QR code with branding and as part of the footer strip, not as an isolated white sticker.
